hero.title: Aipify works for you.
hero.headline: Business Operating System for modern organizations.
hero.description: Aipify brings operations, support, knowledge, governance and approved workflows into one coordinated platform — so the organization can see what changed, what needs attention and what should happen next.

5.description: Activate only the capabilities you need.

6.title: Built in Bergen
6.description: Aipify Group AS — Norway, for the world.

problemOutcome.title: From disconnected work to one operational layer
problemOutcome.problem: Organizations run work across too many disconnected tools, inboxes, dashboards and manual handoffs. Context gets lost. Decisions slow down.
problemOutcome.outcome: Aipify brings approved context, work and decisions into one operational layer — so teams see what changed, what needs attention and what should happen next.

simpleFlow.title: How Aipify works
simpleFlow.subtitle: Governed coordination — not uncontrolled automation.
simpleFlow.permissionNote: Aipify can do anything it has permission to do.

1.title: Observes approved sources
1.description: Connects to systems and knowledge your organization has approved.

2.title: Understands operational context
2.description: Relates activity to roles, policies and current work.

3.title: Prepares the next step
3.description: Drafts, summaries and recommendations ready for review.

4.title: Requests human approval
4.description: Sensitive actions pause until the right person decides.

5.title: Executes within permissions
5.description: Approved work runs inside explicit access boundaries.

6.title: Logs the result
6.description: Outcomes are recorded for accountability and review.

businessPacks.title: Modular Business Packs
businessPacks.subtitle: Organizations activate only the capabilities they need — without buying software they will never use.

support.name: Support
support.value: Triage, knowledge search, draft responses and governed escalation.

hosts.name: Hosts
hosts.value: Guest workflows, property coordination and operational briefings.

commerce.name: Commerce
commerce.value: Order visibility, fulfillment coordination and customer context.

services.name: Services
services.value: Client delivery, knowledge reuse and engagement visibility.

companion.title: One Aipify, connected to your operations.
companion.subtitle: The Companion is not a separate chatbot. It is one Aipify identity — connected to approved organizational context, the same permissions and governance, supporting work across the platform.

identity.title: One identity
identity.description: The same Aipify presence across approved surfaces.

context.title: Approved context
context.description: Connected to organizational knowledge and operational data you authorize.

governance.title: Same governance
governance.description: Permissions, approvals and audit rules apply everywhere.

support.title: Supports the work
support.description: Briefings, tasks and guidance — humans remain in control.

enterpriseTrust.title: Enterprise trust, built in
enterpriseTrust.subtitle: Security, governance and control for organizations that need professional oversight.

approval.title: Approval workflows
approval.description: Human review before sensitive actions run.

audit.title: Audit trails
audit.description: Actions and configuration changes are logged.

ownership.title: Organizational ownership
ownership.description: Your data and decisions stay under your control.

multilingual.title: Multilingual support
multilingual.description: Public and workspace surfaces support multiple languages.

integrations.title: Controlled integrations
integrations.description: Connect approved systems with explicit scope.

practice.title: Aipify in practice
practice.subtitle: Illustrative operational examples — not customer references.

1.title: Support queue coordination
1.challenge: Billing inquiries spike while senior agents are in meetings.
1.coordination: Aipify summarizes new cases, searches approved knowledge and prepares draft responses for review.
1.outcome: Agents approve and send faster — with a full audit trail.

2.title: Operational handoff
2.challenge: A property check-in policy change must reach front desk and support teams.
2.coordination: Aipify flags the policy update, routes approval and prepares briefing notes for affected roles.
2.outcome: Teams act from one coordinated brief instead of scattered messages.

3.title: Executive visibility
3.challenge: Leadership needs a clear picture without opening five dashboards.
3.coordination: Command Brief aggregates approved operational signals into prioritized attention and recommended actions.
3.outcome: Decisions start from one governed summary.

buyingJourney.title: Start with the right foundation
buyingJourney.subtitle: Choose a base plan, add Business Packs as needed, and increase capacity as the organization grows.
buyingJourney.footnote: Activation follows validation and permissions. Enterprise plans include procurement-friendly governance and deployment options.

1.name: Starter
1.description: Essential platform access for early operational coordination.

2.name: Professional
2.description: Expanded capacity for growing teams and Business Packs.

3.name: Business
3.description: Advanced packs, governance and operational depth.

4.name: Enterprise
4.description: Custom deployment, security review and dedicated alignment.

finalCta.title: Ready to see Aipify in your organization?
